name: AMOLED dark theme
description: Changes the default dark theme to use true blacks for AMOLED screens.

name: AMOLED dark theme
description: Changes the default dark theme to use true blacks for AMOLED screens.

name: Block Permissions Request
description: Blocks the request of notification permissions on load of app.

name: Change package name
description: Appends ".morphe" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

name: Disable ads
description: Disables all ads contained within the UI.

name: Disable ads
description: Disables ads during audio streaming.

name: Disable ads
description: Disables all ads contained within the UI.

name: Disable anti-tamper
description: Disables various anti-tamper checks that causes the app to force-close.

name: Disable dynamic app icon
description: Prevents Duolingo from changing the app icon. Only the default icon will be available.

name: Disable Pairip license check
description: Disables Play Integrity API (pairip) client-side license check. This patch does not bypass Play Integrity attestation or pairipcore virtualization.

name: Disable signature check
description: Removes the anti-tamper protection, which verifies apk signature, causing the app to force close.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Disables CamScanner's custom telemetry system.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Disables event logging sent to the app's custom endpoint.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Disables SoundCloud's telemetry system.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Blocks SuperChinese's custom telemetry reporting.

name: Enable custom tabs
description: Open articles using your default browser.

name: Enable debug
description: Enables debugging on the app by setting android:debuggable="true".

name: Enable debug mode
description: Enables hidden debug menu in settings.

name: Enable FotMob+
description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall.

name: Enable Niagara Pro
description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall.

name: Enable Peak membership
description: Enables some app features locked behind the subscription paywall. Not all premium functionality is available.

name: Enable Plus
description: Enable Plus membership (not all features are available). There is a strict version requirement for this patch.

name: Force Native Keyboard
description: When typing in normal lessons, Eggbun forces you to use their own on-screen keyboard. This patches forces the use of the default OS keyboard.

name: Hide app icon
description: Hides the app icon from the Android launcher.

name: MicroG integration
description: Allows the app to work without root by using MicroG instead of Google Play Services.

name: Remove delay
description: Removes the imposed delay when changing VPN servers.

name: Remove trial limit
description: Removes the imposed 6-hour trial usage limit.

name: Rename shared permissions
description: Rename certain permissions shared across Amazon apps. Applying this patch can fix installation errors, but can also break features in certain apps.

name: Skip ads
description: Automatically skips ads baked into the video stream.

name: Unlimited skips
description: Disables the limit for skipping songs during playback.

name: Unlock all lessons
description: Only unlocks lessons on the client UI! This is useful for pre-downloading content during free trial periods.

name: Unlock custom DNS
description: Enables the custom DNS feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.

name: Unlock LAN connections
description: Enables the LAN connections feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.

name: Unlock premium features
description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall. Some UI elements may not show an active membership, but this does not effect functionality.

name: Unlock split tunneling
description: Enables the split tunneling feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.
